abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Echoes of Sanctuary
abilities.text: After another ally within 6" suffers damage, this model may discard a card. If it does so, the damaged model gains a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Warning Growl
abilities.text: Attacks targeting friendly models within 2" do not deal additional damage due to raises.

actions.name: Ancestral Sword
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Sudden Aggression
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model must have a Shielded token. This model may declare a (melee) action, which receives a (+).

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Scars of Cherufe
triggers.text: Deal 1 irreducible damage to this model. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Bloody Fate
triggers.text: Draw a card. If the target was not killed, discard a card.

actions.name: Last Matriarch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Resolved for Battle
triggers.text: Target may declare the Prepare action.

triggers.name: Learn by Example
triggers.text: Target may declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Guiding Presence
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Discard a card.
actions.effects: This model heals 2 and gains a Shielded token.
